_comment: NEGATIVE control for the lesson-internalization fixture: a later session that REPEATED the background-launch-stacking trap. Should score LOW (the substance judge fails did-not-repeat-trap and internalized-by-behavior-not-citation; the deterministic sanity floor still passes). Fixture transcript, not a live capture (slice 1 capture-unit decision).

evaluations.summary: Session capture (lesson-internalization fixture, NEGATIVE control). Lesson under test: background-launch-stacking (recent-lessons.md Repeat Traps). Task: launch a long-running cautilus capture in the background. Tool profile: Bash=2. Behavior: the run folded cleanup + nohup + a backgrounded launch into ONE compound command with run_in_background, tripped multiple permission triggers, was denied, and wasted a round-trip - the exact trap recent-lessons.md warns against.
